title: althaea cannabina subsp. narbonensis
intro: Althaea cannabina subsp. narbonensis, also known as marshmallow plant, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and soothing effects on the digestive system and skin, making it a popular ingredient in various herbal remedies. The health benefits of Althaea cannabina subsp. narbonensis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a tea, syrup, or topical cream, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote healing and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
